Metadata.title: Darkbloom — Private AI on Verified Macs
Metadata.description: Private AI inference through hardware-attested Apple Silicon providers. Your prompts stay encrypted, your data stays yours.

Sidebar.tagline: An Eigen Labs project · Research Preview
Sidebar.disclaimer: Experimental research preview. Provided as-is for evaluation. Not for production use.

AnalyticsConsent.body: Allow privacy-filtered usage analytics to help improve Darkbloom's product experience.

guest.title: Private inference on verified hardware.
guest.subtitle: Your prompts stay encrypted, your data stays yours.
guest.signInHint: Sign in with your email to get started

coordinator.title: Coordinator URL
coordinator.description: The base URL of the Darkbloom coordinator that routes your inference requests to attested providers.
coordinator.connected: Connected — {count, plural, one {# provider} other {# providers}} online

language.title: Language
language.description: Darkbloom automatically chooses a language from your saved preference, browser language, and coarse country signal. You can override it here.

encryption.title: Encrypt requests to coordinator
encryption.description: When enabled, your prompts are sealed to the coordinator's long-lived X25519 public key (NaCl Box) before leaving this browser. The coordinator decrypts inside its TEE, picks a provider, and re-seals to the provider's Secure Enclave key. Anything in front of the coordinator (CDN, proxies, network observers) sees only ciphertext beyond the TLS tunnel. Optional and off by default — plaintext API clients keep working.
encryption.checkbox: Seal each request to the coordinator's public key
encryption.unavailable: This coordinator has not configured sender encryption.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Control whether Darkbloom can load privacy-filtered Google Analytics to measure product usage. Query parameters are sanitized before analytics events are sent, except for the small attribution allowlist used to preserve campaign measurement.

about.title: About Darkbloom
about.p1: Darkbloom is a decentralized private inference network. Your requests are routed to hardware-attested Apple Silicon providers with Secure Enclave verification, SIP enforcement, and Hardened Runtime protection.
about.p2: Provider trust is independently verified through MDM (Mobile Device Management) cross-checking with the coordinator.

ModelsPage.title: Models
ModelsPage.heading: Available Models
ModelsPage.description: Models served by hardware-attested providers on the Darkbloom network.
ModelsPage.empty: No models available. Check your coordinator connection in Settings.

StatsPage.title: Network Stats
StatsPage.heading: Network Statistics
StatsPage.description: Live metrics from the Darkbloom decentralized inference network

ApiConsolePage.title: API Console
ApiConsolePage.intro: Darkbloom API — OpenAI-compatible. Swap your base URL, keep your existing code. Every request is end-to-end encrypted and processed on hardware-attested Apple Silicon.
ApiConsolePage.endpointDescription: Expand each endpoint to see request/response format and notes.
ApiConsolePage.baseUrlDescription: All endpoints are relative to this base URL. Provider attestation and pricing endpoints are publicly accessible without authentication.
ApiConsolePage.keyHelp: Use this key in the Authorization: Bearer header for all authenticated requests.
ApiConsolePage.quickStartDescription: Install the OpenAI SDK or Vercel AI SDK. The Darkbloom API is fully OpenAI-compatible — just change the base URL.
ApiConsolePage.modelsHelp: Model availability depends on online providers. Check /v1/models for real-time availability.
ApiConsolePage.chatDescription: Stream chat completions with any supported model. Supports system messages, multi-turn conversations, and thinking/reasoning output.
ApiConsolePage.listModelsDescription: Check available models, provider counts, and attestation status.

LinkPage.title: Link Your Device
LinkPage.description: Connect your Mac to your Darkbloom account to receive earnings for providing compute.

DeviceLinkForm.missingToken: Failed to get auth token. Please log in again.
DeviceLinkForm.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
DeviceLinkForm.successBody: Your provider is now connected to your account. Earnings will be credited automatically.
DeviceLinkForm.signInPrompt: Sign in to your Darkbloom account to link your device.
DeviceLinkForm.codeLabel: Enter the code shown in your terminal
DeviceLinkForm.runSuffix: on your Mac to get a code.
